create_entry.default: Home Assistant added to the Dataplicity. Enable **Wormhole** in [Device settings]({device_url}) for public HTTPS access.

user.title: Register Dataplicity Device
user.description:
Sign up to [Dataplicity](https://www.dataplicity.com/) and paste the install URL from Add device:
`https://dataplicity.com/XXXXXXXX.sh`

Or, to reuse already-provisioned credentials, paste them as `serial:auth`.
